title: BookMyShow a dominant player but did not abuse its dominant position: CCI closes case
description: The Competition Commission of India (CCI) on Thursday held that Big Tree Entertainment, which operates the online movie ticketing platform BookMyShow, is a dominant player in the online movie ticket booking market but has not abused its dominant position under the Competition Act, 2002.The ruling came in a complaint filed by Vijay Gopal (informant), proprietor of Vanila Entertainments. Gopal runs an online ticket booking platform called Showtyme. He alleged that BookMyShow entered into exclusive
